functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Black Jellyfish Guide
pages:
Black Jellyfish Guide

A Choascraft guide for black jellyfish facts, hazards, parts, and jellyfish gear.

Fact 1

Jellyfish are soft-bodied animals with no bones, brain, or heart.

Fact 2

Most jellyfish drift with currents, but they can pulse their bell to move through water.

Fact 3

Their tentacles can carry stinging cells used for defense and catching prey.

Fact 4

Jellyfish have lived in the oceans for hundreds of millions of years.

Fact 5

Some jellyfish glow with bioluminescence, making light in dark water.

Fact 6

Jellyfish eat tiny animals, fish eggs, larvae, and other small drifting food.

Choascraft Black Jellyfish

Black jellyfish are one of the jellyfish variants chosen by the master jellyfish spawner.

Hazard

Jellyfish hurt nearby non-jellyfish mobs with area damage. Give them room in the water.

Movement

Jellyfish swim, wander, idle, avoid threats, and flock with other water mobs.

Parts

Jellyfish parts are used for colored jellyfish armor. Black gear uses Black Jelly.

Rare Parts

Jelly Pearl and Jelly Cyst are important rare parts for stronger jellyfish equipment.

Crafting Key

I = Iron Ingot
J = matching Jelly
P = Jelly Pearl
C = Jelly Cyst

Helmet

Pattern:
III
IJI
JPJ

Result: matching Jellyfish Helmet

IPI
JCJ
III

Result: matching Jellyfish Chestplate

Boots

Pattern:
IJI
IJI
IPI

Result: matching Jellyfish Boots

Netherite

Use a smithing table with jellyfish armor and a netherite ingot to upgrade it.

Diver Note

Black jellyfish are beautiful from a distance. From too close, they are a lesson.
